title: Ring Platform Roadmap
description: Where Ring is today and where it is going — for founders and CTOs evaluating a white-label platform and the RING token economy.

hero.subtitle: See what ships on flagship rings today, what is landing next, and how RING aligns builders with platform growth.
hero.mandate: Clone. Operate. Extend. No vendor lock-in.

timeline.title: Platform journey
timeline.subtitle: Major milestones on production rings — not vaporware slides.

timelineItems.title: 2025 H1
timelineItems.cardDetailedText: Next.js 16 + Turbopack, React 19, Auth.js v5, PostgreSQL/PostGIS, modular i18n (en/uk/ru), marketplace, opportunities, and white-label propagation.

timelineItems.title: 2025 H2
timelineItems.cardDetailedText: 147+ truth lenses, ring-mcp (57 tools), NODUS-aligned workflows, and governed prompt-driven customization paths.

timelineItems.title: Jun 2026
timelineItems.cardDetailedText: URL/search → cited HTML draft, OG image, TTS, category/tags, Telegram approve, locale fan-out (en/uk/ru). Surfaces: MCP ring-news-generate, admin UI, admin bot.
ConnectPlatform/Firebase deployment paths, Cache Components hardening, richer Reggie ringization, and serialization Phase 2.

timelineItems.title: Horizon
timelineItems.cardDetailedText: Rings that progressively assemble vetted modules from intent — audit-friendly multi-tenant controls and durable orchestration.

shipped.title: Shipped on production rings
shipped.subtitle: Capabilities you can run today — self-hosted or on Ringdom.

demos.title: Live documentation components
demos.subtitle: Phase 1 visualization stack — interactive on this page.

platform.title: Strategic phases
platform.subtitle: Three horizons for platform buyers — baseline, active build, and next wave.

phases.title: Shipped baseline
phases.body: Production stack on ring-platform.org and clones: entities, store, wallet, messaging, memberships, docs, and k8s deployment paths.

phases.title: In development
phases.body: Operator automation (LegioX), generative modules (newsroom, images), MCP gateway hardening, and enterprise ConnectPlatform bridges.

phases.title: Next horizon
phases.body: Intent-driven module assembly, DAO governance hooks, mobile shell, and expanded locale coverage (ES, FR, DE, PT, SW).

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Deep dives for technical due diligence — architecture, APIs, and generative modules.
